title: About Griffin Gold
description: AI-powered Gold & XAUUSD analysis platform with self-learning predictions, smart money tracking, and more
heroSubtitle: Real-time predictions, trading signals, session-based analysis across global markets, smart money tracking, prediction games, and deep market analysis — powered by a 4-model AI ensemble analyzing 192 features across 13 data categories with time-aligned self-learning predictions.

project.title: Incognito Generation
project.subtitle: An Incognito Generation project
project.description: Griffin Gold is developed by Salakhitdinov Khidayotullo as part of the Incognito Generation project — building next-generation tools for gold traders powered by artificial intelligence and machine learning.

whatIs.title: WHAT IS GRIFFIN GOLD?
whatIs.p1: Griffin Gold is a production-grade Gold/XAUUSD prediction platform that analyzes 192 engineered features across 13 categories — technical indicators, news sentiment, macro markets, ETF flows, supply data, central bank activity, and more.
whatIs.p2: It generates time-aligned predictions across 5 timeframes (1H, 4H, 24H, 1W, 1MO) using a 4-model ensemble: Temporal Fusion Transformer (40%), XGBoost (25%), LSTM (20%), and Google TimesFM (15%) — with adaptive weighting that shifts based on model performance.
whatIs.p3: The system features a self-learning feedback loop — it evaluates every prediction, discovers accuracy patterns, populates per-model performance logs, and automatically adjusts confidence and direction based on what it learns.
whatIs.p4: Beyond predictions, Griffin Gold offers session-based analysis across Asian, London, and NY markets, smart money tracking, COT analysis, price alerts, daily AI briefings, an interactive prediction game, central bank monitoring, and ETF flow tracking — available in English, Russian, and Chinese.

selfLearning.title: Self-Learning Prediction System
selfLearning.intro: Griffin Gold doesn't just predict — it learns from every prediction it makes. Here's the complete feedback loop:
selfLearning.step1_desc: Time-aligned predictions are generated at fixed UTC intervals — 1h every hour, 4h every 4 hours, 24h once daily. Pattern adjustments are applied before storing.
selfLearning.step2_desc: After each window closes, the system compares predicted vs actual price, computes error metrics, classifies volatility regime and trend state, and creates a detailed analysis record.
selfLearning.step3_desc: Each individual model (TFT, LSTM, XGBoost, TimesFM) is scored separately. This feeds the continuous learning system that adjusts ensemble weights.
selfLearning.step4_desc: Every 6 hours, the pattern engine analyzes all evaluations to find accuracy patterns — model disagreement effects, volatility regime impacts, RSI threshold behaviors, confidence calibration gaps, and time-of-day biases.
selfLearning.step5_desc: Discovered patterns automatically modify future predictions — reducing confidence when patterns suggest lower accuracy, boosting it when conditions favor the models.

timeAligned.title: Time-Aligned Predictions
timeAligned.intro: Predictions are now generated at fixed UTC times instead of arbitrary intervals, ensuring each timeframe is properly aligned:
timeAligned.1h: Generated every hour at :00 UTC. Evaluated at :05 after the window closes.
timeAligned.4h: Generated every 4 hours (00:02, 04:02, 08:02, 12:02, 16:02, 20:02 UTC). Evaluated at :07.
timeAligned.24h: Generated once daily at 00:04 UTC. Includes 1W and 1MO timeframes. Evaluated at 00:09.
timeAligned.note: A countdown timer on the dashboard shows when the next prediction arrives.

howToUse.title: HOW TO USE GRIFFIN GOLD
howToUse.subtitle: New here? Follow these 5 steps to get started:
howToUse.step1_desc: — check the live Gold price, dual prediction cards (AI + Quant) with countdown timer, trading signals, and market overview at a glance.
howToUse.step2_desc: — view AI-generated entry, target, and stop-loss levels with confidence scores and risk ratings.
howToUse.step3_desc: — browse news sentiment, Fear & Greed index, influencer mood, and social volume to gauge market emotion.
howToUse.step4_desc: — explore technical analysis (45+ indicators), Power Law, Elliott Wave, liquidation maps, fundamental analysis, and ETF flows.
howToUse.step5_desc: — check the History page's Analysis tab to see per-model accuracy, error distributions, active learned patterns, and the 7-day rolling accuracy trend.

architecture.title: AI Ensemble Architecture
architecture.tftDesc: Multi-horizon attention model — captures long-range dependencies and variable-importance weighting
architecture.xgboostDesc: Gradient-boosted trees — excels at feature-based classification with 192 engineered inputs
architecture.lstmDesc: Recurrent neural network — detects sequential patterns in 168-hour (1 week) lookback windows
architecture.timesfmDesc: Zero-shot foundation model — provides a baseline from pre-trained time-series knowledge
architecture.adaptiveNote: Weights are adaptive — the continuous learning system shifts allocation based on each model's recent accuracy from per-model performance logs. A sentiment modifier (up to ±50%) amplifies or dampens the ensemble signal. Learned patterns can further adjust confidence when specific market conditions are detected.

howAiWorks.title: HOW THE AI WORKS
howAiWorks.step1_desc: 4 models independently analyze 192 features and vote on each prediction. TFT leads at 40%, but weights adapt based on recent performance — reducing individual model bias.
howAiWorks.step2_desc: Models auto-retrain every 6 hours using the latest market data. If accuracy drops below 55% or 50+ new predictions are evaluated, retraining triggers immediately.
howAiWorks.step3_desc: Every evaluation logs each model's prediction vs reality separately. This feeds the weight adjustment system — models that perform well get more influence, degraded models get less.
howAiWorks.step4_desc: Every 6 hours, the system analyzes all prediction evaluations to discover accuracy patterns — volatility regime effects, model disagreement signals, RSI threshold behaviors, confidence miscalibrations, and time-of-day biases.
howAiWorks.step5_desc: The system stores up to 500 historical events, tracking their actual impact at 1h, 4h, 24h, and 7d. When similar events occur, it pattern-matches to predict expected impact.
howAiWorks.step6_desc: Learns which specific news words and phrases historically move the market. Over time, this builds a language-to-price correlation map that improves sentiment accuracy.
howAiWorks.step7_desc: New model candidates compete against production models before promotion. Only models that outperform the current ensemble get deployed — ensuring quality never regresses.
howAiWorks.step8_desc: When retraining produces better weights, the ensemble hot-swaps them without stopping the prediction pipeline. Zero downtime, continuous improvement.
howAiWorks.step9_desc: Every prediction gets a detailed post-mortem — error percentage, volatility regime, trend state, per-model breakdown, model agreement score, and top influential features. All visible in the History Analysis tab.
